rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution includes a narrative historical review of mitigation-oriented JMR research, and the cited 2019 JMR paper on liquidity constraints and the poverty penalty directly fits that harm-mitigation theme. This makes the citation plausibly part of the editorial’s substantive framing of prior mitigation work rather than an obviously incidental mention. Despite only DOI-level match evidence, it is safer to retain for second-stage review.
